The '''Beacon''' was a sanctuary established on<ref name="The Finale 1" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories|Outer Rim]]<ref name="Chronicles of the Jedi">''[[Star Wars: The High Republic: Chronicles of the Jedi]]''</ref> [[planet]] [[Dalna]] for individuals who had been displaced by the [[Nihil conflict]] which ended<ref name="The Finale 1" /> in [[228 BBY]]<ref name="Date">The [[Battle of Eriadu]] occurred in [[228 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:THRContent228BBY|here]].</ref> with the [[Battle of Eriadu]]. Its creation was sponsored by the [[Nihil]]-turned-[[bounty hunter]] [[Lourna Dee]], who did not want her patronage to be made known. Four [[Standard month|months]] after the battle, a feast was held at the Beacon with a number of [[Jedi]] and other allies, including [[Galactic Republic]] [[Supreme Chancellor]] [[Lina Soh]], attending. [[Keeve Trennis]], a [[Jedi Master]] in the [[Jedi Order]] was offered the position of [[Speaker (Beacon)|speaker]] for the Beacon, resigned from the Order with the intent of taking up the position. Jedi Master [[Sskeer]] was also appointed as the Jedi's liaison to the Beacon.<ref name="The Finale 1" />
